items.placeName: Bãi 3 Cây Dừa (Three Coconus Tree Beach) Longbeach

facebook.caption: This beach fixes burnout. Bãi 3 Cây Dừa sits right on Long Beach and somehow still feels like you have it to yourself. Three coconut palms, soft sand, water that actually looks like the brochure. No beach clubs. No DJ sets. Just the sound of waves doing their job. If your Phu Quoc trip is back-to-back tours and resort pools, block two hours for this. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

items.placeName: Basket Boat Tour & Kayak Tour (Dynasty Phu Quoc)

facebook.caption: Tourists keep scrolling past this one. Basket boat tours in Phu Quoc hit different when there's no crowd. Spin in a traditional Vietnamese coracle, then grab a kayak and go at your own pace. 4.9 stars across 348 reviews and it still flies under the radar. Book it before the algorithm finds it.
